use std::path::Path;

fn find_rust_files(dir: &Path) -> Vec<&Path> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for entry in std::fs::read_dir(dir).unwrap() {
        let entry = entry.unwrap();
        let path = entry.path();
        if path.extension().map_or(false, |e| e == "rs") {
            results.push(path);
        }
    }
    results
}
